currentLinkedIn.headline: Backend Engineer at Paypocket | Go · Kafka · PostgreSQL | Singapore
currentLinkedIn.about: I build payment services that process millions of transactions daily without losing a cent. Four years in fintech back-end, obsessed with idempotency and distributed consistency.

experience.title: Backend Engineer
bullets: Designed idempotent payment retry logic that eliminated 99.97% of duplicate charges on a Kafka-based pipeline
Optimised PostgreSQL query performance for settlement ledger; reduced P99 from 380ms to 45ms
Contributed to on-call rotation for services handling SGD 2B+ in monthly transaction volume

experience.title: Junior Software Engineer
bullets: Built internal REST APIs in Go for inventory management consumed by three downstream services
Implemented automated integration tests that cut pre-release regression time from 3 days to 4 hours
